programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar goes missing and the pups need to find it before the evening campfire concert

programme.title: Ricky Zoom
programme.desc: Scootio programs her Scootbops to perform repairs just like Maxwell. But when they think they can do a better job, things start to go wrong

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: The duo must rescue the statue of Prior, the original pirate, before a volcano erupts and destroys it

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey's Amazing Adventures
programme.desc: The inquisitive puppet finds out how the Romans made their mosaics, and the Milkshakers! create some of their own

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The youngster and her family collect apples and blackberries to make a pie

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: Shiny and Iris have fun dressing up their beloved doll, but Hopper has his own concept of beauty

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas, focusing on people who have fallen into debt and those tasked with recovering the money

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Susan and Gary bought an East End flat to let out and were approached by a letting agent who promised hassle-free guaranteed rent. But before they knew it, he had broken in and changed the locks. Now they are fighting to get the property back. Meanwhile, landlord Paul discovers that his seriously ill father's long-standing tenant owes a staggering £20,000 in rent for living in her Notting Hill home

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: It remains to be seen whether Colby will confess to the murder of Ross Nixon, Dean contemplates owning up to his part in the crime, and everyone is shocked by Willow's testimony

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Faced with insurmountable debt and a dangerous individual, Hendrix gets ready to meet his fate. Toadie realises that the world of online dating is far harsher than he expected

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: A Lilliputian lope round the Inner Hebrides puts Jane in touch with her Scottish roots, as alongside just six other passengers the singer embarks on what is easily her smallest ever cruise. Jane enjoys unseasonably cloudless skies and sparkling seas as the route takes in the puffin-packed Treshnish Islands and Fingal's Cave on Staffa, the mythic rock formation that famously inspired Mendelssohn's Hebrides Overture. The excursion is rounded off with some traditional trappings, from ceilidhs and weaving to haggis-making

programme.title: More Bitter Than Death: An Emma Fielding Mystery (2019)
programme.desc: Emma is thrust into a new mystery when a prominent archaeologist is poisoned on the eve of announcing her successor. Mystery, starring Courtney Thorne-Smith

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Faced with insurmountable debt and a dangerous individual, Hendrix gets ready to meet his fate. Toadie realises that the world of online dating is far harsher than he expected

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: It remains to be seen whether Colby will confess to the murder of Ross Nixon, Dean contemplates owning up to his part in the crime, and everyone is shocked by Willow's testimony

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: The Highland Vet
programme.desc: Documentary following staff at DS McGregor and Partners mixed vet practices in Thurso and Wick as they work to help farm animals, horses, domestic pets and wildlife. In the first edition, vet Shondie faces the most dramatic case of her career when a two-month-old Tamaskan puppy is brought in after being attacked by an older dog

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall comes to the aid of a German Shepherd working as a security dog at a nightclub, who gets confused about who exactly he is supposed to protect the business against. Other clients include a labradoodle who objects to her owners doing any housework and a dispute between the dogs belonging to two generations of the same family

programme.title: The Drowning
programme.desc: Jodie searches for proof that Daniel is her missing son, but Mark interrupts her search and dismisses her offer of future lessons. It remains clear that there is no mother around, but she is unable to make any more progress with her search. Ade comes under pressure from the document forgers to come up with more money for Jodie's papers, and when she tries to help, it leads to a run-in with her brother

programme.title: A Country Life for Half the Price with Kate Humble
programme.desc: Kate meets people who have started self-sufficient new lives in the country. The first episode features the Cook family from Exeter, who plan to move to the other end of the country and make a fresh start in the Shetland Islands. They plan to fund their new lifestyle through AirBnB and an isolated space for authors, but their move is complicated by a serious illness in the family

programme.title: The Proposal (2009)
programme.desc: A Canadian publishing editor working in New York faces deportation to her own country. Desperate to stay in America, she offers her assistant a promotion if he will marry her, but an immigration official becomes suspicious and the pair are forced to go to desperate lengths to look like a happy couple. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock and Ryan Reynolds

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Inside Iceland: Britain's Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: The secret world of Iceland's food development, sourcing, manufacturing and distribution, through exclusive access to the outlets and suppliers. In Thornton Cleveleys, just north of Blackpool, bargain-hunting customers are queuing overnight to be first in line to get some cheap food and the chance to win vouchers to spend at the opening of a brand new store

programme.title: Tattoo Disasters UK
programme.desc: Featuring Tom whose fiancee Jennifer has issued an ultimatum - get rid of the images of three of his ex-girlfriends on his body or the wedding is off. Plus, musician Emilia, who got a tattoo of a bar of music before making a grizzly discovery - the notes play the funeral march

programme.title: Tattoo Disasters UK
programme.desc: Featuring a Star Wars-themed cover-up, a beauty queen whose career hangs in the balance because of her bad ink, and a 52-year-old rockabilly fan who may be facing a midlife crisis

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton ride to the rescue of a couple who are having trouble selling their converted chapel in Yeovil, Somerset. Happily, a lick of paint and the eviction of a resident rat help transform the dingy interior into a cool, airy space

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor and presenter visits Durham cathedral, one of Britain's first Unesco World Heritage sites and a leading tourist attraction. The cathedral is over 900 years old and built like a fortress. It is 218ft tall and when first constructed was the country's tallest building. The bishops at Durham were so powerful that they were given the title Prince-Bishop to reflect their huge wealth and influence. As well as exploring the Norman edifice, Tony meets a modern-day treasure hunter who has discovered hidden lost treasures from the cathedral in the River Wear

programme.title: The Harry Hill Movie (2013)
programme.desc: The quirky comedian is tricked into thinking his hamster has only one week to live, so he and his nan decide to grant the pet's dying wish of a holiday in Blackpool. However, they do not realise they have fallen into a trap set by Harry's evil twin brother. Comedy, starring Harry Hill, Julie Walters, Matt Lucas and Sheridan Smith

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters (2013)
programme.desc: The modern-day teenage son of the Greek god Poseidon must lead his friends on a perilous journey into the Bermuda triangle. They need to recover the legendary Golden Fleece to save the world, but getting to it means braving all manner of terrifying monsters. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Logan Lerman and Alexandra Daddario

programme.title: Cocoon (1985)
programme.desc: The elderly residents of a retirement home treat themselves to an occasional dip in the pool at an abandoned house. It turns out that friendly aliens in human form are using the place to restore dormant members of their species - and energy from their cocoons is giving the old-timers a new lease of life. Ron Howard's sci-fi drama, with Wilford Brimley, Jessica Tandy, Hume Cronyn, Don Ameche and Steve Guttenberg

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman

programme.title: Max Steel (2016)
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old McGrath is bewildered and unsettled when he suddenly starts exuding increasingly powerful energy from his fingers. As this power grows to dangerous proportions, Max meets Steel, a small but feisty flying alien who says he can help. Family fantasy adventure, starring Ben Winchell, Maria Bello and Andy Garcia, with the voice of Josh Brener

programme.title: Transporter 3 (2008)
programme.desc: Underworld courier Frank Martin's latest assignment involves transporting the kidnapped daughter of a crooked government minister across Europe on behalf of an eco-terrorist faction. However, a device will kill him if he leaves his car, thugs employed by the politician are out to murder him, and his passenger has a bad case of Stockholm syndrome. Action thriller sequel, with Jason Statham and Natalya Rudakova

programme.title: Kiss the Girls (1997)
programme.desc: A forensic psychologist hunts for a serial kidnapper stalking a university campus and responsible for his niece's disappearance. Working out of his jurisdiction, he defies local law enforcement officials to get to the truth - with the aid of one of the criminal's past victims, a headstrong doctor determined to see her former captor brought to justice. Thriller, starring Morgan Freeman, Ashley Judd, Cary Elwes and Tony Goldwyn

programme.title: Sicilian Ghost Story (2017)
programme.desc: Luna, a 12-year-old girl who has fallen for her classmate, ventures deep into enchanted Sicilian forests to find him, unaware of how thick the mystery behind his strange disappearance is. Drama, starring Julia Jedlikowska, Gaetano Fernandez and Corinne Musallari

programme.title: BSL Zone: Still Here
programme.desc: Comedy drama about a group of ageing Deaf Club performers - Les, Reg, Cyril and Ruby - who have been performing together for over 30 years

programme.title: Esther Waters (1948)
programme.desc: A kitchen maid succumbs to the advances of a caddish stable lad and falls pregnant - but is abandoned for another woman. Period drama, starring Dirk Bogarde and Kathleen Ryan

programme.title: Rage at Dawn (1955)
programme.desc: Three notorious outlaw brothers terrorise Indiana, using a small town as a safe haven and paying off local officials to turn a blind eye. A detective poses as a fellow bandit to set a trap for them, but the case is complicated when he falls for their sister, who remains misguidedly loyal to her villainous family. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Forrest Tucker, Mala Powers and J Carrol Naish

programme.title: Death Drums Along the River (1963)
programme.desc: A British inspector is called to Africa to investigate the murder of a fellow policeman and uncovers a diamond-smuggling operation seemingly connected to an upriver hospital. Mystery, based on Edgar Wallace's novel Sanders on the River, starring Richard Todd, Marianne Koch, Albert Lieven and Walter Rilla

programme.title: Only the Valiant (1951)
programme.desc: A tough cavalry officer selects six unlikely comrades to undertake a vital mission to defend an isolated fort against marauding Apaches. His men's initial hostility soon turns to respect, however, as they realise his wily ways will see them through the conflict. Western adventure based on a novel by Charles Marquis Warren, starring Gregory Peck, Barbara Payton, Ward Bond and Lon Chaney Jr

programme.title: Ride Along 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Excitable beat cop Ben longs to work alongside his fiancee's brother, hard-boiled detective James, who does not think he has what it takes. James decides to show Ben that he is not cut out for the job by recruiting him to help bring a drug dealer to justice. Comedy sequel, starring Ice Cube, Kevin Hart and Olivia Munn

programme.title: The Nice Guys (2016)
programme.desc: A private detective investigates the murder of a porn star in 1970s Los Angeles, only to run into a hired thug employed to scare him off. However, the mysterious disappearance of a woman connected to the case forces the unlikely duo to work together, leading them to uncover a government conspiracy. Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling

programme.title: The Gambler (2014)
programme.desc: A literature professor mounts up hundreds of thousands of dollars in debt to a ruthless loan shark and the organiser of an illegal gambling ring after becoming addicted to placing bets. In a last-ditch attempt to pay off his creditors, he risks everything - including his life - on one last game. Thriller, starring Mark Wahlberg, Jessica Lange and John Goodman

programme.title: Out of the Furnace (2013)
programme.desc: A steelworker caring for his terminally ill father is reunited with his younger brother, who has returned from service in Iraq. However, the former soldier becomes involved with a criminal gang and disappears without trace. The elder brother is frustrated at the police's failure to find him and takes matters into his own hands. Crime thriller, starring Christian Bale, Woody Harrelson and Zoe Saldana

programme.title: Dakota Incident (1956)
programme.desc: Mismatched travellers, including a bank robber, a politician and a dancing girl, are targeted by Cheyenne braves when their stagecoach is ambushed in the Dakota desert. When the coach is set on fire, they take cover in a gully, and a drawn-out conflict ensues. Western, starring Dale Robertson, Linda Darnell, John Lund and Ward Bond

programme.title: This Happy Breed (1944)
programme.desc: A working-class family moves into a new suburban home after the father returns from service in the First World War. However, the couple and their children struggle to adjust to life higher up the social ladder. David Lean's drama, adapted by Noel Coward from his play, starring Robert Newton, Celia Johnson, Robert Stanley Holloway and John Mills

programme.title: My Man Godfrey (1936)
programme.desc: A spoiled aristocratic woman hires a tramp as her butler, little anticipating how valuable he will prove _ or what effect his charms will have on her. Classic comedy, starring William Powell, Carole Lombard and Alice Brady

programme.title: The Far Country (1954)
programme.desc: A cowpoke is steering his cattle north to the Canadian border when a corrupt sheriff commandeers the herd. A local saloon-bar owner falls for the hapless cowboy, and with her help he recaptures his cattle. Hooking up with a wagon train, the couple head for the mining town of Dawson, but the thwarted and embittered sheriff is on their tail. Western, with James Stewart, Walter Brennan and Ruth Roman

programme.title: The Imitation Game (2014)
programme.desc: Biopic of mathematician Alan Turing, whose work during the Second World War translated seemingly unbreakable Nazi codes as well as pioneering the development of computer technology. In the years following the war, his life would be destroyed as his homosexuality was discovered, leaving him facing criminal charges. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Keira Knightley and Charles Dance

programme.title: Red (2010)
programme.desc: A retired CIA agent survives an assassination attempt and realises something in his past has made him a target. He sets out to reunite the members of his old hit squad to find out who is trying to kill them and why, but in the process, uncovers dangerous secrets. Action thriller, with Bruce Willis, Morgan Freeman, John Malkovich and Helen Mirren

programme.title: Moonlight (2016)
programme.desc: A young African-American man in a rough Miami neighbourhood grapples with his identity and sexuality while experiencing the everyday struggles of childhood, adolescence and burgeoning adulthood. He finds support from a drug dealer and his kindly girlfriend, who can see he is being neglected and offer him sanctuary. Barry Jenkins' Oscar-winning drama, starring Mahershala Ali, Naomie Harris, Alex Hibbert, Ashton Sanders and Trevante Rhodes

programme.title: Lost & Found (2017)
programme.desc: Comedy drama following seven interconnecting stories set in and around a lost and found office at an Irish train station. Written, directed by and starring Liam O Mochain, with Norma Sheahan and Brendan Conroy

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Celeste finalises the arrangements for Toby, but she does not get chance to warn him about her plans. Meanwhile, Tom enlists Brooke to get Ollie the help he needs

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Featuring an attempt to get dressed on a treadmill, a vending machine, a fall into a river and a penalty kick back

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of a French restaurant in the heart of Moorpark, California. The pompous, over-complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away and there is an imminent threat of bankruptcy. However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lela's, a California restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After an intense commitment ceremony, the experts announce a very special surprise - the introduction of two new couples halfway through the experiment

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Four new arrivals set off on their honeymoon, while the original newlyweds celebrate their one-month milestone. But a salacious new rumour drives some couples to a confrontation

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples are in for a shock during the next dinner party, as two new couples are introduced to the rest of the group in the next stages of the experiment. Later, cracks start to show in some of the couples' relationships

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCool's, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzio's two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon discovers a surprise screening of The Avengers is scheduled at a local cinema, complete with a Q&A session with the film's director, Joss Whedon. However, the event just happens to clash with time he'd planned to spend with Amy, so he decides to pay Stuart to be his subtitute for the afternoon while he and the other boys immerse themselves in Marvel superheroics. Meanwhile, Leonard's mother Beverly arrives in town for an extended visit, and Penny takes the opportunity to bond with her new mother-in-law - and to make up for not inviting her to the wedding. Comedy, guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Conflict arises when Leonard's newly divorced parents and Sheldon's devoutly religious mother are all in town at the same time. And when Howard and Raj are contacted about the guidance system they've developed, they assume that the government is out to get them. Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends struggle through an awkward morning after Sheldon's mother and Leonard's father share an evening together. Penny's family arrives in town to attend Penny and Leonard's second wedding ceremony. Keith Carradine, Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the Air Force Department of Material Command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating: The Mansion
programme.desc: Two celebs decide to ditch their dates, while Kimberly and Shane try their hand at archery, but it remains to be seen whether Cupid's arrow will hit its mark

programme.title: Temptation Island
programme.desc: Controversial social experiment, featuring four couples at a pivotal time in their relationships, where they must decide if they're ready to commit to each other for the rest of their lives - or go their separate ways. Together, the couples travel to the tropical paradise of Hawaii, where they join 24 eligible men and women and live the 'single life', in the ultimate test of commitment

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets another selection of inventively pointless tasks for the celebrity quintet of Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring. Daisy flirts with a security guard, Richard is surprised by some chickens and Johnny convinces Alex to wear sparkly shoes while operating heavy machinery. As ever, Greg Davies decides who is the best of the worst

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics pass judgment on programmes including Strictly Come Dancing, The X Factor, Britain Afloat, Liar, The Great British Bake Off and Celebrity Hunted, as well as news stories about Theresa May and Harvey Weinstein

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating: The Mansion
programme.desc: Two celebs decide to ditch their dates, while Kimberly and Shane try their hand at archery, but it remains to be seen whether Cupid's arrow will hit its mark

programme.title: Temptation Island
programme.desc: Controversial social experiment, featuring four couples at a pivotal time in their relationships, where they must decide if they're ready to commit to each other for the rest of their lives - or go their separate ways. Together, the couples travel to the tropical paradise of Hawaii, where they join 24 eligible men and women and live the 'single life', in the ultimate test of commitment

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette decide they do not want to know the gender of their unborn child, but are upset when they hear Raj has found out before they have. After Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a cohabitation experiment with Sheldon to stay with him while her apartment undergoes repairs

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Celeste finalises the arrangements for Toby, but she does not get chance to warn him about her plans. Meanwhile, Tom enlists Brooke to get Ollie the help he needs

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The stakes couldn't be higher for the four remaining bakers contesting the final, as they prepare a themed afternoon tea for friends and family. In the only Signature challenge of the series, the bakers prepare both entremets and pastries simultaneously. In their last and most important bake, it's the finalists' last chance to impress in the form of the ultimate Showstopper - a tiered, afternoon tea layer cake. Harry Hill hosts, alongside judges Liam Charles and Ravneet Gill

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Hal is banned from gambling at a casino during a family holiday and instead takes Malcolm and Reese on a disastrous trek in the desert. Meanwhile, Francis sneaks home from the military academy, only to find nobody there. Comedy, starring Frankie Muniz, Justin Berfield and Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Reese and Malcolm compete with Dewey for the attention of their attractive new babysitter, and an old rival brings out Hal's fighting instincts - much to the amusement of Lois. Comedy, starring Frankie Muniz, Bryan Cranston and Jane Kaczmarek

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard meets up with the woman he kissed during his trip in the hope of setting Penny's mind at ease, while Sheldon films a special episode of Fun with Flags after his break-up with Amy. Bernadette feels guilty about keeping a secret from Penny

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle enlists Peralta's help in tracking down his son's favourite toy for Christmas, but they find themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian crime ring as a result. Back at the precinct, the team members get ready for the annual Christmas carol competition against their rivals at the Metropolitan Transit Authority. Mary Lynn Rajskub guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Peralta and Santiago make a bet on which of them can bring in the most escaped prisoners, with the loser forced to move into the winner's apartment when they start living together. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Pastor Jeff and Robin make hesitant plans to marry, seeking Mary 's help for a cheap, small, bare-bones wedding. George Sr and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household, while Missy flushes a fried chicken down the toilet which causes it to overflow. US comedy, with Lance Barner, Annie Potts and Zoe Perry

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: George Sr is furious when Georgie tries to buy his way out of his household chores, while Sheldon learns to listen when an emotional Paige struggles with her parents' divorce

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Following the break-up of Penny's relationship, Leonard finally summons up the courage to ask her out. When she accepts, they both turn to Sheldon for advice on how to handle the forthcoming date. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself forced to keep a secret when Penny decides to tell him what happened on her disappointing first date with Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: First episode of the comedy, focusing on an 11-year-old boy as he captures his family on video camera during the 1980s. Barry wants to start driving on his 16th birthday, but Beverly advises against it and refuses to allow Pops to sell him his old car. Starring Jeff Garlin, Troy Gentile and Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A day at the roller-skating rink leaves Murray wishing he had not asked Erica to tell him about her life, while Pops steps in to help when a back-to-school shopping trip causes problems between Beverly and Adam. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases. Boyle, Jeffords and Gina attempt to resolve a petty conflict between Scully and Hitchcock, while Holt loses Santiago's favourite pen. Guest starring Gina Gershon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz learn there's more to Lt Melanie Hawkins' team than meets the eye as they continue their search for the gang of bank robbers. Jeffords, Boyle and Santiago begin to suspect that Gina is harbouring a secret. Ryan Phillippe, Gina Gershon and Jason Mantzoukas guest star

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples are in for a shock during the next dinner party, as two new couples are introduced to the rest of the group in the next stages of the experiment. Later, cracks start to show in some of the couples' relationships

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cop comedy returns after a mid-season break. When one of the precincts in the area must be closed, an evaluation process takes place. The squad is confident about its assessment - until it turns out the auditor is Santiago's ex-boyfriend Teddy

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didn't commit, it's up to the other members of the Nine-Nine to find out what really happened and try to save them from going to jail

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Angel

Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In Cumbria, the architect meets Harry, who wants to take a derelict Victorian railway signal box and turn it into a garden summerhouse for his home, while in Derby, 22-year-old wood carver Sophie hopes to transform a campervan into a mobile home and showroom to use to sell her wares at festivals. On his Italian road trip, George discovers a spectacular house made almost entirely out of glass near Lake Lugano, and at the wilderness retreat, he and Will struggle to get the walls right

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Award-winning architect Jo Cowen, who has worked on projects including the British Museum and the JP Morgan tower at Canary Wharf, is called in to help Croydon couple Denise and Ali breathe new life into their uninspiring council house. She plans a striking glazed extension, and comes up with a further idea for the upstairs that requires an extra £40,000 on top of the not inconsiderable £120,000 budget. But problems begin to appear, pushing the couple to the brink

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: In this art deco special, George takes on a challenging period property in Newquay, owned by Gareth and Frances Jenkins. The building was once an architectural gem, but over the years has been the victim of unsympathetic modernisations, making it unrecognisable from its 1930s heyday. The challenge is to strip away the ugly accretions to reveal the house in all its glory - while also making it suitable for modern family living. Plus, George visits a stunning seaside home and Britain's biggest collection of neon signs

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-lover Kerry Bolwell-Williams kicks off a week of dinner parties in the Welsh valleys, where she hopes that a full choir and a simple menu will impress her guests and make her an early contender for the £1,000 prize. However, she does not react well when it is suggested that her home has a rather distinctive smell

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Food-lover and theme park fan Dave Morris hosts the second dinner party in the Welsh valleys, hoping his home-grown herbs, hand-picked fruit and complicated menu will win him the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Shop owner Tasnim Sardar hosts the third night of the competition in the Welsh valleys, and hopes her Pakistani-inspired party will secure her the £1,000 prize. Financial advisor Gill Leonard likes her curries to be hot and spicy, and is particularly pleased by Tasnim's curried cauliflower

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ryan Woodward hosts on the fourth night in the Welsh valleys and has put a lot of thought into his evening, but each of his courses goes wrong - from a bread blunder to a clam crisis. He hopes an Ibizan dance lesson and drinks served in his hot tub will help to turn the party around

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in the Welsh valleys, financial advisor Gill Leonard dons the oven gloves to entertain the other contestants, and there is a dramatic start to the evening thanks to a mock fire-breathing dragon. Later, the host makes a remarkable revelation to her shocked guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Shannon Slater-Dent and Trevor Tredgett's Bove Town House in Glastonbury, but a poor night's sleep bothers Kathryn and Trevor from Treberthan B&B

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Treberthan B&B in Par, Cornwall, where owner Kathryn Langley and her best friend Trevor Burnell set out to give their guests a taste of Cornish hospitality

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at SugarBeat Eating House in Swainsthorpe, Norfolk, run by Stevie King and David Lovett, but the establishment's cleanliness quickly comes under fire

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Fritton Arms in Norfolk, run by Ben Davenport and partner Sian Dewaal. David and Stevie are upset about their feedback so they conduct a forensic-style room inspection - complete with rubber gloves - and a paddleboat race on a nearby lake brings out everyone's competitive nature. Ben impresses the guests by revealing the hotel's aristocratic connections - but soon comes under fire for allowing pets to stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners reunite to find out what they have been paid, with Shannon and Trevor from Bove Town House wanting to discuss Kathryn's comments about her poor night's sleep

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee teacher Kirsty Davenport kicks off a week of dinner parties in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where she hopes that a simple menu will impress her guests - property finder Ann-Marie Hamilton, sales consultant Russell Turnbull, part-time lecturer Adam Holt and hairdresser Becci Moloney

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ann-Marie Hamilton hosts day two in Eastbourne, where she plans to entertain her guests by singing in her garden. Fellow contestant Russell makes a lot of jokes, but foodie Adam does not seem amused

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Becci Moloney hosts the third dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, and prepares a menu of hearty food for her guests. Her outdoor bar makes a positive impression on rivals Kirsty and Ann-Marie, but Russell and Adam are puzzled by her collection of recycled toilets in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Adam Holt hosts the fourth dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where his fellow competitors' expectations are high. However, some of them are surprised by his menu - which fails to amount to much more than sausages and mashed potato

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Raconteur Russell Turnbull hosts the final night in Eastbourne, East Sussex. Having played his cards close to his chest all week with regards to his culinary skills, his plans for a fancy menu intrigue his rivals. However, for all the bravado, it remains to be seen whether he can actually cook

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets artists Indi and Rebecca, who are planning to construct a modern, larch-clad home on the Isle of Skye, with a second hand-crafted building alongside to use as their studio, all on a tight budget of £150,000. They have been saving for years, but making it happen will mean taking on the savage weather, not to mention the sceptical locals - and as if that weren't enough, most of the work is being done by one man, local builder Donald

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man who wraps his pick-up truck around a tree, and another who is having severe chest pains that could be a sign of a heart attack

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A busy night shift sees a series of men admitted with various problems. Father-of-six Stacey is experiencing breathing difficulties, but his demanding attitude appears to mask a vulnerability. Twenty-year-old Sam is brought in after being attacked outside a nightclub and has possible injuries to the neck and spine. He is nervous because his father died at the hospital and, with a broken nose, is worried he may have lost his looks. Henry has an electrician's exam the following morning but has been hiccuping for three days. Registrar Faheem is determined to diagnose the problem and get him well in time

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside one of Britain's busiest A&E departments at King's College Hospital in south London. A doctor is shocked when a young woman arrives in resus with life-threatening swelling on her brain following a random attack by a stranger on the streets, while a mother faces an agonising wait as tests are carried out on her 12-year-old son, who was hit by a car and airlifted to King's by emergency medics. A 90-year-old former circus performer is also in A&E after collapsing at home, and news of his colourful past quickly circulates among the staff

programme.desc: Jason and Lindsay from East Yorkshire met 28 years ago when they were working for the RAF. Lindsay suffers from osteoarthritis, which affects her mobility, and as warm sunshine helps her condition their dream is to spend every school holiday in Florida with their son before eventually retiring there. They have a budget of up to £180,000, but will Ben Hillman be able to find them what they're looking for?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is near Preston, where Simon O'Brien restores a spotlight he believes may be from a German U-boat while Henry Cole gets creative with an aircraft jump seat

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is in Hay-on-Wye and Bedford, where Henry restores a bespoke workbench, and Simon ponders the possibilities of some discarded planks of wood

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree meet Lincolnshire couple Tim and Rebecca, who have a birdbrained scheme to transform their aviary into a boutique brocante shop. DIY superwoman Fiona takes on the Kings Tower as she starts renovating her first luxury suite. It's no easy task as the room has been left in a 1970s time warp from when it was last used as part of a holiday camp. And wedding preparations hit boiling point for Tim and Sasha as a heatwave strikes the south of France

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Herefordshire to meet couple Tim and Fliss, who have been fighting to get planning permission for their new home for three years while living in a static caravan, and hope to save £70,000 through a self-built, timber-framed house when they get the go-ahead to start work on a small plot of family land

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at The Admiral Hotel in central London, run by owner So Shaw and hotel manager Kevin Jankunas. Chris Foster and his German companion Christel Richter are floored by the London prices, and Ursula Beswick and Daria Pakalnicka question the quality of the facilities. Despite So and Kevin's best efforts to charm their guests, a dinner conversation leaves Kris Malde and Vikki Cheatham making accusations of sexism and So and Kevin are outraged by some of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to The Redstone in Blackpool, where high-end hotelier Ursula Beswick and manager Daria Pakalnicka hope their luxury guest house will win the day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris Foster and Christel Richter invite the hoteliers to Ann's Farmhouse in the suburbs of Bradford, West Yorkshire, but tensions remain high between So, Kevin, Kris and Vikki

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the R Inn in Desborough, owned by Kris Malde. However, when simmering tensions between the guests boil over, one of them refuses to stay the night

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: As the B&B owners meet for the last time, bones of contention include a missing biscuit, marks on a toilet seat and one guest is confronted about why they refused to stay the night. There are harsh words and home truths before the overall winner is revealed

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect heads off to Italy, where it seems the residents have also been bitten by the 'small buildings are beautiful' bug. The most spectacular place he visits is so high up in the mountains that it's only accessible by helicopter, but this difficulty is more than made up for by the views seen from it. Back in Britain, George meets a man turning a wrecked private jet into a crash pad and a Gypsy tattoo artist with big plans for an old railway carriage. George also challenges his pal, craftsman Will Hardie, to create a woodland retreat for less than the price of a family holiday

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Mr Parsons the chameleon meets a new partner, Daphne from Paris. Jaguars Napo and Goshi are being encouraged to mate, but Nap doesn't seem to be romantically inclined. Young giraffe Murchison faces the great outdoors for the first time, and another baby elephant is born, less than a month after the last new arrival

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree give a magnificent five-metre-high staircase a makeover with help from design experts Dorothy and Arthur. Tim and Rebecca start creating a two-bedroomed guest gîte in a derelict outbuilding and host a group of international guests for an autumnal flower arranging weekend, while Cheshire couple Steve and Angela get windswept as they revamp their poolside al fresco kitchen

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets artists Indi and Rebecca, who are planning to construct a modern, larch-clad home on the Isle of Skye, with a second hand-crafted building alongside to use as their studio, all on a tight budget of £150,000. They have been saving for years, but making it happen will mean taking on the savage weather, not to mention the sceptical locals - and as if that weren't enough, most of the work is being done by one man, local builder Donald

programme.title: The Yorkshire Dales and the Lakes
programme.desc: Shepherds Peter and Robert Bland head to market with their older draft ewes, while in Cracoe, Barbara Slater and daughter Cathy remember Barbara's father

programme.title: The Billion Pound Hotel
programme.desc: Shaped like a giant sail and standing more than 1,000ft tall, the Burj Al Arab in Dubai cost an estimated £1billion to build, and has been dubbed the world's most luxurious hotel. Guests paying anything up to £10,000 a night expect only the highest of standards, so what does it take for the staff to satisfy these demanding customers? This programme follows the stories of a variety of visitors, from the King of Uganda to a firefighter who has saved up months of wages, and the workers who serve them

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the famous quiz, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by guests Rhod Gilbert and Sara Pascoe. Countdown regular Susie Dent is assisted in Dictionary Corner by Johnny Vegas, while Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers with a little help from Joey Essex

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eighty-year-old Rose has fluid on her lungs and is having trouble breathing. Her daughters Christine, Sandra and Debbie put on brave faces around her bedside, convincing her that everything will be all right, but in the relatives' room there's high emotion as they contemplate life without their mother. Also in resus at King's College Hospital is Kevin, a 55-year-old trucker who has sustained injuries in a road accident

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for West Babylon, New York, to help the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts. The chef struggles to cope with disorganised staff and an unappealing menu, but quickly realises the real problem lies in the kitchen, where a lack of leadership and communication is causing serious trouble

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

Countdown regular Susie Dent is assisted in Dictionary Corner by Johnny Vegas, while Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers with a little help from Joey Essex

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads to Sicily, where a vast network of tunnels leads to a subterranean salt-processing plant. Kate Quilton looks at free range hens, and is surprised to learn that most chicks on British farms have their beaks trimmed at birth. In the Netherlands, she visits a new cutting-edge farm designed using the latest scientific advances in hen welfare. Plus, in Scotland, Matt Tebbutt makes a surprising discovery about the origins of haggis, and then faces the ordeal of delivering some unwelcome news to an unsuspecting audience

programme.desc: Laura Hamilton shows five properties on Tenerife to newlywed couple Brian and Wendy Woods, who are looking to buy their dream home on the island within a budget of £180,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien restores an enamel roll-top bath and builds a den out of old doors. Henry Cole makes a wall mounted safe from a jerry can and lovingly restores a cheese-making trough

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Herefordshire and Worcestershire. Henry makes a table from the base of a broken agricultural grain mill, while Simon creates a garden seat from an old mangle

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree give a magnificent five-metre-high staircase a makeover with help from design experts Dorothy and Arthur. Tim and Rebecca start creating a two-bedroomed guest gîte in a derelict outbuilding and host a group of international guests for an autumnal flower arranging weekend, while Cheshire couple Steve and Angela get windswept as they revamp their poolside al fresco kitchen

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets engaged couple Jamie Ashton and Joanne Scurr who want to build a family home in Hull without compromising on design, but who are struggling to fund both a new build and their approaching wedding, despite the groom-to-be gaining some great deals through his connections as an architect

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Meudon Hotel in Falmouth, Cornwall, where owner Gaye Woods hopes to impress rivals Tim and Mikey, Joan and Geoff, and Sue and Chris

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Malborough in Devon and The Royal Oak pub, run by laid-back owner Tim Heap, and the basic rooms are a hit for some, while others question the cleanliness

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Angel Guest House in Tiverton, Devon, where owners Chris and Sue Holliday have created a homespun experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Expectations are high as the guests arrive at the Compton Swan in Berkshire, after co-owner Joan McGowan revealed she was named Ireland's Businesswoman of the Year

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a man trying to build the first UFO-styled prefabricated Futuro house seen in Britain for 50 years, and a woman creating a magical garden room using centuries-old techniques, involving earth, sand, straw and even human hair. George's Italian road trip takes him to a traditional village, where he discovers the most modern of houses with an extraordinary design featuring a floating swimming pool. And, as he and Will get down to work on their wilderness retreat, there's a close shave involving an oak tree

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Black rhino Kitani is due to give birth at Chester Zoo and help swell the ranks of this endangered species, but, having lost three previous calves, it is a worrying time and the keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan. The zoo also has four rare new arrivals called tenrecs, mysterious mammals from Madagascar and, with so little known about them, the keepers try everything they can to help them breed, while red river hog Mali has given birth to twins, but tearaway dad Confetti is a threat to his own babies

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie aims to restore an old chateau carriage for her mother Isabelle's wedding, while it is moving-in day for Debbie and Nigel as they embark on a new life in France

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: In 2010, architectural designer Lincoln Miles and artist Lisa Traxler found an uninspiring 1970s bungalow on a plot on the Isle of Wight surrounded by ancient woodland. As part of their renovation project, they added a three-storey 'tower' extension and used a range of unconventional techniques and alternative materials. Two years later, Kevin McCloud returned to find out whether the couple's methods led to success

programme.title: Chatsworth House: A Great British Year
programme.desc: The Duke and Duchess review a newly restored guide to the house written by a past duke, and consider writing their own version to leave to future generations of the family

programme.title: Inside Poundland: Secrets from the Shop Floor
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary following the retailer's bid to shed its bargain basement reputation and go upmarket in an effort to attract new customers. Managing director Barry visits the Walsall branch to help with the launch of Project Diamond - a multimillion-pound investment into giving stores a makeover and branching into new product lines like frozen and chilled food

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 39-year-old man is flown to London's King's College Hospital after being involved in a head-on collision while driving a friend's sports car, and doctors fear his injuries could leave him paralysed. Meanwhile, 21-year-old Thomassine requires treatment following a skateboarding accident and the staff see to Matias, 34, who has been dragged along a station platform by a moving train

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy game show, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by comedians Katherine Ryan and Rob Beckett. Comedian Greg Davies is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eatery's co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 39-year-old man is flown to London's King's College Hospital after being involved in a head-on collision while driving a friend's sports car, and doctors fear his injuries could leave him paralysed. Meanwhile, 21-year-old Thomassine requires treatment following a skateboarding accident and the staff see to Matias, 34, who has been dragged along a station platform by a moving train

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads off to Israel on the trail of the fresh date, with his search taking him to a vast water purification plant where the raw sewage of Tel Aviv is used to turn barren desert into fertile farmland. Kate Quilton is in Belfast to meet a sausage-maker whose sales suffered in the wake of the recent World Health Organisation report linking processed meat to cancer, while Matt Tebbutt is in Kent, where experts have perfected the science of growing apples

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: A flash property developer wants his AMG Mercedes C63 customised to match his Porsche, Bentley and Range Rover, which have all already been wrapped in gold

programme.title: Yianni: Supercar Customiser
programme.desc: Tension rises when a fussy client chooses an unusual nardo grey wrap for his Ferrari, and a last-minute check shows the car is missing a vital element

programme.title: Rick Stein's Spain
programme.desc: The chef heads for the region of Extremadura, famous for paprika and Iberico ham. He then concludes his exploration of the country by driving south in his camper van to the city of Seville - the capital of tapas and flamenco

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters try to impress Oxford residents by building an electric car, and refuse to let an unenthusiastic response deter them from sitting in on the machine's crash-test before handing it over to the Stig's environmentally friendly cousin. Actor Michael Sheen is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car, and Jeremy Clarkson pits the Corvette ZR1 against the Audi R8 V10

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and Richard Hammond debate which company has made the greatest number of exceptional vehicles, and James May finds a way of transporting caravans to campsites without inconveniencing other road users. The Top Gear track plays host to a replica of one of the world's most famous rally cars, and broadcaster Chris Evans - some five years before he was announced as the show's new presenter - is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Coverage of the offbeat event from Seattle, where teams create vehicles without engines and race downhill

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While combing through an impressive collection, Mike finds a rare Ford, and the guys pick a Tennessee home hiding a big secret

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank discover a fleet of amazing concept cars, some so unique they do not know how to price them

programme.title: Road To Riches
programme.desc: Lucas visits Shaun to help him sell a life-size bear. Meanwhile, the first ever poster of the first ever feature film makes a pretty penny

programme.desc: Olympic long jump champion Greg Rutherford, broadcaster Kirsty Young, actress-writer Joanna Scanlan and comedian Henning Wehn join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Charles Dance, Stephen Mangan, Isy Suttie and Gok Wan join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the comedy panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul and Bob fish for barbel in Hay-on-Wye, and sample the great outdoors in spectacular fashion when Mortimer decides to strip in celebration of their catch. Passing a graveyard, they muse about the future and chat to a local vicar about death and their own funerals. To lighten the mood, back in their wooden fishing cabin, Bob promises Paul a very special treat if they are successful with their angling efforts

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by writer and actor Jessica Knappett for his latest trip, touring the island in a silver Citroen 2CV, discovering there is more to Ibiza than foam parties, and visiting the Unesco world heritage site of Dalt Vila in the capital. They also take in al fresco art at the island's version of Stonehenge, experience an exclusive supper club run by the global superstar chef Boris Buono and sample a selection of pricy cocktails, flowriding and a hippy gong bath

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by Eddie Izzard for two days in Slovenia, where they begin by trying Slovenian tapas and the country's orange wine in the capital city Ljubljana. Day two starts with a trip out of town to the stunningly beautiful Lake Bled, where they try summer tobogganing and a spot of rowing, while there's also a magic church bell, custard pastries and a funicular ride to Ljubljana Castle

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist ventures into uncharted territory in pursuit of new discoveries. He takes on physical challenges, encounters extraordinary wildlife and meets remarkable people. In the first edition, Steve and a team of climbers and jungle survival experts head into the ancient landscape of South America's Guiana Shield. This vast wilderness of pristine forests and towering table-top mountains is one of the most inaccessible terrains on the planet

programme.title: Border Interceptors

programme.title: Border Interceptors
programme.desc: Officer James O'Hearne has to deal with a passenger who has no passport and no form of identification, while a Chinese lady who has just arrived from Toronto faces being deported

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compete in a 1950s-style race from London to Edinburgh. On the footplate of the A1 Tornado steam train, Jeremy has to feed the boiler with a constant supply of coal, while Richard braves the saddle of a Vincent Black Shadow motorbike and James drives an old Jaguar XK120 as the trio discover what Top Gear might have been like 60 years ago. Michael Schumacher drives the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson spares no expense when he tests the BMW X6. James May joins Margaret Calvert, one of Britain's road-sign designers, to test-drive the Vauxhall Insignia VXR, and Richard Hammond tries out a £340,000 Lexus supercar. Plus, musician Seasick Steve is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef continues his 900-mile road trip from Venice to Istanbul, sampling that array of gastronomic delights that lie on the route. In the penultimate episode Rick arrives in the Greek Peloponnese where he samples mouth-watering dishes such as rooster stew hilopites with mizithra cheese, and a home-made moussaka he claims is the best he have ever savoured. In his Symi island kitchen, Rick rolls up his sleeves to prepare galaktoboureko, a dessert of semolina custard in filo pastry, a favourite dish in Greece

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the first of two special editions marking the centenary of the outbreak of the First World War. She and a small group of experts travel to the Thiepval Memorial to the Missing of the Somme in France, where visitors tell their family stories of the conflict, with various items helping to bring their tales to life. Objects include pictures of horses sent to war painted by a doctor serving on the frontline, bronze sculptures of troops modelled from trench clay and the belongings of a woman who treated wounded soldiers. Fiona also meets a 101-year-old woman who still remembers one of the first bombing raids on Britain, when she and her classmates hid under their school desks

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Wendy Tinnion helms the final event in Cumbria and decides to throw a Friday night disco for her fellow diners. However, her guests are in for a shock when they discover something unexpected about their host

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Another selection of neighbourly conflicts, featuring a dispute between two retired men about a new driveway, which resulted in the pair fighting in the street in the Tayside town of Kinross. programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Wiltshire couple Edward Lea and his wife found their happy retirement was short-lived when an imposing 8ft breeze-block wall - dubbed the Great Wall of China - was built by their neighbour between their properties. In Scotland, Karen Ryrie and her elderly mother are fed up with living opposite John Tyer, his three dogs and a huge family of rabbits. Following their complaint about the smell, Karen's subsequent accusation of assault has made the dispute far more serious. programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents chase more than £1,700 in unpaid parking fines in south-east London, but struggle to pinpoint the debtor. Meanwhile, officers in north Wales try to recover the £2,000 owed by a tradesman to a former employer, and in Kent agents chase £8,000 owed by a jewellery shop to two former employees

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, the agents chase up a £3,000 deposit owed by a landlord to his tenant, and officers in Birmingham try to recover £25,000 from a nightclub owner for unpaid solicitor fees. Meanwhile, agents Max and Paul are in Surrey as they attempt to collect more than £3,000 owed to a garage after a customer disputed the repairs made to his van

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The efforts of north London landlord Franc to evict a tenant withholding rent payments on a property whose boiler mysteriously stopped working whenever the rent was due, and a tenant with asthma who has been forced to sleep on his sofa for two years in a damp flat. Plus, a landlord owed £7,000 in rent discovers her nightmare is not over when she evicts the tenant and gains access to her property

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Stavros and Emily try to get their house back from squatters, while Margaret attempts to recover the £20,000 she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house. Documentary series in which cameras follow the victims and villains of the buy-to-let boom

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Documentary examining some of Britain's most notorious murders, charting the last few days leading up to the killing from the perspectives of both perpetrator and victim. The programme uses dramatic reconstruction to pinpoint the trigger that set each one in motion, providing in-depth psychological analysis and scrutiny of the devious and calculating plans the killers formulated

programme.title: Harold Shipman: 5 Mistakes That Caught a Killer
programme.desc: The case of serial killer Harold Shipman, the doctor who in the year 2000 was convicted of murdering 15 of his patients by injecting them with diamorphine - but is believed to have been responsible for the deaths of more than 200 people. This documentary reveals the string of mistakes that led to his arrest

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A psychological profile of former nurse Beverly Allitt, who is currently serving 13 life sentences for murdering four children and injuring nine others at Grantham Hospital in Lincolnshire in 1991. Psychologists and criminology experts explore the possible motives for her crimes, examining her behaviour during childhood, when she was known to be an attention seeker

programme.title: Murdered By
programme.desc: The story of a 22-year-old woman who escaped war-torn Syria, but her new life in the UK turned into a nightmare when it turned out her abusive husband had a secret family in Afghanistan

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis examines how CCTV means wrongdoers can no longer hide in a crowd, looking at its use in convicting people involved in the August 2011 riots across England

programme.title: Empire
programme.desc: The pressures of business put a strain on Cookie and Lucious' relationship. Cadence feels she has been betrayed - but uncovers a path to a bright future

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: In Shropshire, a man moves in to his parents' home to help put a stop to a neighbour's harassment, but events escalate into violence. In Essex, a mother and her daughter find what seems to be the perfect house, only for their lives to be made a misery after they object to a planning application for an extension. Two elderly residents who feel they are the victims of noise from next door have to deny any wrongdoing themselves when the police arrive on their doorstep

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A Devon woman finds herself spending a night in the cells after a dispute with a neighbour who just happens to be a policeman, while a York man gets an unexpected soaking after an argument with the person next door. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: Columbo: Ransom for a Dead Man (1971)
programme.desc: A devious lawyer hatches the perfect murder plot - she kills her husband, tells the police he has been kidnapped and leaves the body at the ransom drop, making it look like the criminals who abducted him finished him off. However, the crumpled cop sees through her ruse and begins picking apart her story in his inimitable manner. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Lee Grant and Patricia Mattick

programme.title: Columbo: Lady in Waiting (1971)
programme.desc: A desperate woman is determined to rid herself of her domineering brother and gain control of the family business, so hatches a plan to shoot him and claim she thought he was a burglar. Although her plan seems to have worked, her new-found power goes to her head - and she also has to contend with Columbo, who is convinced of her guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leslie Nielsen and Susan Clark

programme.title: Columbo: Last Salute to the Commodore (1976)
programme.desc: The owner of a shipbuilding business disapproves of his son's plans for the company, and announces his intention to sell up. However, that night, he is murdered and his body dumped at sea. The crumpled cop, joined by two sidekicks, becomes convinced the victim's son is responsible - but everything is not as it seems. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Vaughn, directed by Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: Columbo: Forgotten Lady (1975)
programme.desc: An agelong actress grows desperate to recapture her glory days and resorts to murdering her husband and making it look like suicide. She hopes the publicity will revive her flagging Broadway career, but she reckons without Columbo's uncanny ability to see through her devious performance. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Janet Leigh, Sam Safe and John Payne

programme.title: Columbo: Lovely but Lethal (1973)
programme.desc: A cosmetics company is rocked by the revelation that a pirated version of their latest product is on the market, and then, shortly afterwards, one of their chemists is found murdered. But when the shabby sleuth scrutinises the case, he suspects the events are linked to a rival company. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Vincent Price, Martin Sheen and Vera Miles

programme.title: Columbo: Mind Over Mayhem (1974)
programme.desc: A scientist is overjoyed when his son follows in his footsteps, receiving widespread acclaim for a revolutionary new theory. When a fellow boffin produces evidence of plagiarism, the ruthless father resorts to murder to save his son from a scandal. But he reckons without the dishevelled detective, who sees through his efforts to make the killing look like the work of burglars. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Jose Ferrer and Lew Ayres

programme.title: Columbo: Blueprint for Murder (1972)
programme.desc: An architect kills his business partner, and comes up with an elaborate scheme to make Columbo first suspect him, then reject him as the murderer. The villain begins by teasing the detective with hints on where he has hidden the body - hoping that when Columbo fails to find a corpse, he will look elsewhere for a killer. Crime drama, directed by and starring Peter Falk. With Patrick O'Neal and Janis Paige

programme.title: Columbo: Murder with Too Many Notes (2000)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning composer Findlay Crawford relies on his assistant Gabriel to do all the hard work, but the younger musician demands recognition. To protect his reputation, Findlay kills Gabriel with a time-delayed drug to give himself the perfect alibi - but the slovenly sleuth sees through his ruse. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Billy Connolly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives make their way to a recording studio after receiving a domestic abuse call from prominent R'n'B singer Mischa, who claims she was attacked by her rapper boyfriend. Armed with information as to his likely whereabouts, Amaro and Fin head off to confront him

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The best-selling author of an erotic novel is attacked and the subsequent investigation leads the team to a popular TV talk-show host. Crime drama, guest starring Anna Chlumsky and Adam Baldwin, with Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Captain Cragen takes back control of the SVU team, and the detectives are tasked with exposing a sex trafficking operation enslaving young women that has possible terrorist connections. Crime drama, starring Dann Florek, Kathryn Erbe and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a religious website creator leads Bernard and Lupo to a network of corruption in a charitable foundation that provides the motive for the crime. The case becomes even more complicated when the suspect manages to avoid prosecution by being granted asylum, leaving McCoy fighting for his career

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a book editor who was reputedly having an affair with one of her authors, and find themselves focusing on the lover's long-time companion, whose alibi turns out to be a tissue of lies. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a model and discover splashes of blood that obviously did not come from the victim, but suggest the culprit is a relative. With Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A crime-scene investigator is killed in her apartment, and evidence initially leads Lupo and Bernard to her fiance - until a journalist is attacked by a taxi driver, and DNA evidence opens up an entirely new line of inquiry. Drama, starring Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate after an aspiring musician is found dead behind a bin, and a bag of money left nearby leads them to a number of suspects. One of them confesses to the shooting, but says he only did it because he thought his daughter had been abducted. Further investigation by the detectives reveals that there may be a link between their case and a possible terrorist threat. Guest starring Michael Kenneth Williams (The Wire, Boardwalk Empire)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy begs the team to find his father who, he claims, has been kidnapped. The agents learn the missing man is a lieutenant commander working on a confidential project, but their inquiries lead them to believe he disobeyed orders and deleted the information he was sent to acquire

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The bodies of two assassins are delivered to NCIS from overseas - so Tony and Ziva assume their identities and keep a rendezvous at a luxury hotel in a bid to discover who they had been sent to kill. Unfortunately, Gibbs finds out his team is not the only one working on the case. Drama, with Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Fingerprint evidence implicates Tony in a woman's death and he finds himself accused of murder. Convinced of his innocence, the other members of the team set out to clear him - even though all the facts seem to indicate he is guilty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a Navy lieutenant is found murdered in his hot tub, the team interviews several families in the victim's somewhat peculiar neighbourhood. Meanwhile, Torres must face the consequences after a volatile night out with Palmer. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Wilmer Valderrama

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at an apartment building brings navy officer Terence Keith to the team's attention and it transpires he had been on medication for anxiety, a condition that had led to him being ejected from a pilot's training course. Ducky's profile of Keith suggests that he may be unstable and about to exact revenge for having his dream of becoming a fighter ace taken away from him, and evidence points to him intending to carry out a suicide attack

programme.title: NCIS
