programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A boy is kidnapped while in the care of his father, and the investigation reminds the officers of an unsolved abduction that occurred in the same neighbourhood 13 years earlier. Benson vows to learn from past mistakes to set both cases right. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A ballerina tempts fate by appearing in a production thought to be cursed - and when she is discovered dead shortly after a performance, the superstitious rumours are seemingly proved valid. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury and Marisa Berenson

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a seductive conman is killed, Castle and Beckett must investigate New York's elite. Meanwhile, Castle plans to surprise Beckett on their one-year wedding anniversary

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Conclusion of a three-part story. The investigation into a movie studio boss's murder becomes further complicated when fresh evidence points to yet another suspect. Meanwhile, the ex-husband of the deceased goes to trial to face accusations of having a hand in the crime - is an innocent man about to be convicted? Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Bernard and Lupo investigate the suspected hit-and-run death of the mistress of the CEO of a failed investment bank. The evidence leads the pair to a kidnapping and extortion plot that uncovers several potential suspects, including a disgruntled client

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates when a journalist is found murdered, but the case presents new evidence for an old crime involving a man serving a life sentence for spying for the Chinese government. Keith Carradine guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis discover a man leading a secret double life when they investigate who opened fire on a group of people disembarking from a party cruise. A major dispute erupts when Schiff confronts the governor and attorney general over the decision to seek the death penalty. Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pizza delivery man is murdered, causing trouble when the two suspects point the finger at the other. Though one of the pair is taped admitting to the crime, his Catholic priest uncle forbids the team from violating the sanctity of the Confessional. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard struggle to establish a motive when a woman who adopted 10 children with learning difficulties is murdered. The duo question her husband, who discovered the body, before turning their attention to the youngsters - until information about an affair and the offer of a reality TV appearance sheds light on the case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of fashion company owner Sid Maxwell, and question their initial conclusion of asphyxia when they meet photographer Terry Clark. The duo discover a suspicious website after learning Maxwell was using a fake identity

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An undercover police office is killed by McGee while on duty, and Jenny approves an investigation into the death. But the decision places a strain on her relationship with Gibbs as the team tries to prove that the agent was not culpable, despite the evidence building against him. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A model dies while filming a reality TV show at a US Marine base, and an autopsy reveals she was killed by a drug overdose administered by someone else. Inquiries lead the team to identify three possible suspects - but one of them is also murdered. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva disappear while searching for smuggled weapons at a shipyard. Gibbs is soon on the case and learns the pair were looking for a freight container thought to hold explosives from Iraq. McGee tries to get a GPS trace on the missing duo's mobiles, leaving the others struggling to find them before they come to serious harm. Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames' investigation into the disappearance of a book-keeper leads back to the death of her brother, a hitman, two years previously. The evidence seems to point to an imprisoned mobster - until a second body is discovered and the case becomes less clear-cut. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The trial of pimp Bart Ganzel begins. Meanwhile, Detective Cassidy is accused of raping a woman while undercover, resulting in a court appearance of his own. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A sports reporter seeks Benson's help to accuse a cameraman of rape, but only agrees to press charges after she discovers the man is stalking her. Before the trial begins the team finds out she is pregnant, and ADA Barba must contend with questionable defence tactics as a result

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A baby's abduction from a playground leads to a twisted case of lies, betrayal and infidelity. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Reports of sexual abuse surface at an elite private school, prompting Detective Benson and ADA Barba to confront a powerful administrator to expose decades of secrets. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Bull

programme.title: Bull

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. Sisko uncovers a plot among senior Starfleet officers to overthrow the Federation government and replace it with military rule. Odo helps him find the proof he needs - but the nefarious Admiral Leyton is hot on his heels. Starring Avery Brooks

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer invites a group of aliens, who have set out on a pilgrimage to a protostar, to come on board the Enterprise. All is well until he discovers his old enemy Silik is among the party and must be prevented from altering the future for the worse. Sci-fi drama, starring Scott Bakula

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Part one of the two-part finale of the magical adventure series. Morgana prepares to wage war on Camelot with Mordred at her side, while Merlin finds the burden of his destiny weighing heavily as the ancient prophecies play out with unnerving accuracy. It soon becomes clear that the young wizard must find a way to save himself before he can help his allies bring about the salvation of his beloved kingdom. Colin Morgan, Bradley James and Katie McGrath star

programme.title: The Beverley Allitt Tapes
programme.desc: Survivors, investigators and police interviews combine to tell the story of the nurse dubbed the 'Angel of Death' after being convicted of murder, attempted murder and grievous bodily harm of 13 children under her care in 1991

programme.title: Wynonna Earp
programme.desc: Willa's memory starts returning, and with it, a mixture of guilt and resentment in the younger Earps. Feeling unwanted, she escapes to Bobo's bar, where her trigger-happy antics draw the attention of a band of mercenaries. Elsewhere, the Doc has an mysterious encounter. Western drama, starring Melanie Scrofano, Anna Quick and Tim Rozon

programme.title: Walks Around Britain

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: The Boy Who Stole a Million (1960)
programme.desc: A boy robs a bank to pay for repairs on his father's car, and is pursued by the police and criminals after the money. Comedy adventure, starring Virgilio Teixeira and Maurice Reyna

programme.title: Strongroom (1962)
programme.desc: Two people are locked in a bank vault during a robbery, but the crooks have a crisis of conscience and try to free them while avoiding the police. Crime drama, with Colin Gordon

programme.title: They Made Me a Fugitive (1947)
programme.desc: Soho black marketeers frame a former RAF pilot for murder, forcing him to go on the run until he can exact revenge on them. Thriller, starring Trevor Howard, Sally Gray and Griffith Jones

programme.title: The Case of the Frightened Lady (1940)
programme.desc: A woman employed as a secretary to her aristocratic aunt has to contend with sinister servants plotting behind her back and a scheme by her employer to marry her off to her own cousin. The situation is complicated further when the family's doctor is accused of murder. Thriller, starring Marius Goring and Penelope Dudley-Ward

programme.title: Calculated Risk (1963)
programme.desc: An ex-convict plans one last daring heist, by tunneling into a bank vault through the basement of a neighbouring house. Crime drama, starring William Lucas and John Rutland

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: London-based current affair series, with Michael Hayman

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash deals with the Nazis latest secret weapon, while Salt disobeys orders one time too many

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: For the first time in its long history, the famously discreet luxury hotel in Mayfair, central London, opens its doors to documentary cameras, with director Jane Treays spending a year behind the scenes following staff and guests. The Melchors from California arrive for their annual two-week stay, rekindling their relationship with personal butler Michael Lynch, while energetic general manager Thomas Kochs travels to New York to drum up new business from leading US travel agents

programme.title: Summerfield (1977)
programme.desc: A teacher arrives in a small coastal community to take over as teacher of the local school. As he investigates the mystery of his predecessor's sudden disappearance, he uncovers a connection with a girl who lives on a nearby island who has a rare blood disorder - and the long-buried secrets of the community. Drama, starring Nick Tate and John Waters

programme.title: Dying of the Light (2014)
programme.desc: A CIA agent is diagnosed with a degenerative condition that results in him being forced to retire from the world of intelligence. When he receives word that a terrorist who once tortured him has resurfaced, he goes rogue and sets out to assassinate the man while he is still able. Thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Anton Yelchin and Irene Jacob

programme.title: Cam Girl (2018)
programme.desc: Documentary about webcam porn, following the experience of one performer, who has lost custody of her son due to her occupation

programme.title: Long Weekend (1978)
programme.desc: A couple take a camping holiday at a remote beach to try and rebuild their struggling relationship. Their disrespect for the wildlife and the environment provokes the wrath of a supernatural presence, and the torment they endure from it brings tensions between them to the surface. Horror, starring John Hargreaves and Briony Behets

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Three Steps in the Dark (1953)
programme.desc: A wealthy eccentric invites all the members of his family to his country house, so he can discuss the contents of his Will. However, when he is suddenly killed, everyone present is a suspect. Murder mystery, starring Greta Gynt and Hugh Sinclair

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the cliffs at Flamborough Head and through Clumber Park, Nottinghamshire

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra and his friends build a boardwalk so they can get to the water park easily

programme.title: Zot the Dog
programme.desc: The tales of Zot, a good-hearted, fun-loving but rather bouncy dog and his best pal, Clive

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: The Uber Story
programme.desc: Uber is among the most recognisable brands in the world. But their ride to success has been far from smooth. How did the app giant outsmart regulators and crush its competitors?

programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Dandy Dick (1935)
programme.desc: A church vicar tries a variety of schemes to come up with money to fix the church's steeple. When his plans fail, he bets his savings on a horse race. Comedy, starring Will Hay

programme.title: Trottie True (1949)
programme.desc: A strong-willed showgirl marries into the aristocracy after a fling with a pioneering balloonist - but comes to regret her choice. Period comedy, with Jean Kent and James Donald

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks from Banavie to Gairlocky and around the Ribblehead Viaduct

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Exploring assumptions about the origins of American popular music, including the belief that drums were brought to the USA by enslaved people from the coastal regions of Africa. The programme travels to Austria, Texas and the edge of the Sahara desert to uncover the real story behind the theories

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: Best of The Tube

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, a student at Kew in the 1970s, offers an insight into the work carried out behind the scenes by the 150 staff at the Royal Botanic Gardens, which house a diverse collection of plants and are a leading centre for scientific research and conservation

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: Marie encounters with one of her husband's accusers, and is left shaken by a difficult interview with his barrister. Both experiences leave her questioning whether it was love, or denial, that allowed her to remain loyal to Paul for so long - despite his many affairs. Meanwhile, Gerry manages to dig up some evidence that seems to thoroughly discredit one of Paul's key accusers. However, making use of this new knowledge will mean Paul has to make an uncomfortable decision. Legal drama, starring Robbie Coltrane, Julie Walters and Kerry Fox

programme.title: Ladies That Punch
programme.desc: Documentary about the Ladies Boxing Association, whose members come from all walks of life, from catwalk models to IT workers

programme.title: Rude Boy (1980)
programme.desc: A fan of new wave punks The Clash follows his musical heroes on tour, but slowly finds himself disagreeing with their ideals. Ray Gange stars in this semi-documentary view of street politics in the 1980s, including concert footage of the band

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: Calculated Risk (1963)
programme.desc: An ex-convict plans one last daring heist, by tunneling into a bank vault through the basement of a neighbouring house. Crime drama, starring William Lucas and John Rutland

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

Starring Leslie Banks, Michael Redgrave, John Mills, Will Hay and Robert Morley

programme.title: The Case of the Frightened Lady (1940)
programme.desc: A woman employed as a secretary to her aristocratic aunt has to contend with sinister servants plotting behind her back and a scheme by her employer to marry her off to her own cousin. The situation is complicated further when the family's doctor is accused of murder. Thriller, starring Marius Goring and Penelope Dudley-Ward

programme.title: The Harassed Hero (1954)
programme.desc: A hypochondriac is ordered by his doctor to avoid stressful situations. Unfortunately, he inadvertently becomes involved in an explosive international criminal caper. Comedy, starring Guy Middleton and Joan Winmill Brown

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Extended highlights of the First Test at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane, as the 2013 three-match series got under way. The tourists had already played here against Queensland Reds and will have been aware of the need to start strongly against the injury-hit Wallabies. Lions coach Warren Gatland has a strong squad to select from and was looking to begin in the same fashion as the 2001 vintage, who won in Brisbane in the opening Test of that tour

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the Second Test at the Etihad Stadium in Melbourne, as the Lions aimed to clinch the 2013 series after winning a thrilling First Test 23-21. The Lions suffered their heaviest defeat on this ground during the 2001 tour, as the Aussies overturned a half-time deficit to run away 35-14 victors. With just one Test remaining, the result here will determine whether there is anything riding on next Saturday's final showdown

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the third and final Test at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, as the 2013 tour reached its conclusion. The opening two Tests were both decided by the narrowest of margins - the Lions prevailed 23-21 in the opener in Brisbane, as Australia missed a chance to win the match with the final kick of the game, before the Wallabies earned revenge by triumphing 16-15 in Melbourne, with the visitors failing to score from a last-gasp penalty attempt on that occasio

programme.title: Rugby Union Retro
programme.desc: James Gemmell & Miles Harrison wind back the clock with Jamie Roberts to remember the deciding test of the Australia v British & Irish Lions series from 2013
